name: Fondaparinux
executiveSummary: Synthetic anti-Xa anticoagulant; orthopedic prophylaxis and pulmonary embolism in heparin allergy without HIT.
indications:
## Indications

- Thromboprophylaxis in major orthopedic surgery.
- PE/DVT in selected regimens.

## Precautions

- Contraindicated in severe CKD (ClCr < 30). No specific antidote.

> Adjust per institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: Prophylaxis: 2.5 mg SC every 24 h. PE: 5–10 mg SC according to weight.

pediatrico.dose: Limited use under pediatric hematology supervision.

stability:
## Stability

- Do not refrigerate prefilled syringes according to package insert.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. ACLS / PALS / NRP Guidelines.
ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Society of Critical Care Medicine (SCCM). ICU medication guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
